{{Quote|Just a little ''wind,'' friend Luke... because that's what ''I'' do.|Wind|<ref name="DYKWYCA" />}}
'''Wind''' was one of the four [[Android/Legends|android]] creations of [[the Keeper]]. She had the ability to manipulate wind.

==Biography==
{{Quote|And yet... even a machine can know ''loneliness.'' Thus, the Keeper created four android ''helpers...'' in the image of its ''own'' creators.|The Keeper's vision|<ref name="TKS" />}}
[[The Keeper]] was left by her [[Keeper's makers|makers]] on the [[Keeper's World]] to restore it after it was devastated in an [[Unidentified war|ancient war]]. To assist with this task, and to fend of her loneliness, the Keeper created four nameless [[Android/Legends|android]] helpers. One of these was an android in [[Gender/Legends|female]] form who could control wind.<ref name="TKS" />

During the [[Battle of The Keeper's World]] the androids sided with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] against a squad of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]].<ref name="DYKWYCA" /> During the battle Wind knocked the Stormtroopers prone with her powerful gusts, allowing the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to escape.<ref name="COM">{{StoryCite|story=Caverns of Mystery!|book=Pizzazz 7}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Names? We don't really ''have'' any.|Wind|<ref name="DYKWYCA" />}}
Wind had the appearance of a [[Human/Legends|human]] female with long blond hair that seemed to constantly billow in an unseen breeze. She was not immediately identifiable as a droid, save for her [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]], which looked like a yellow light shining from black eye sockets.

Wind was the most inquisitive of the Keeper's android creations, as well as the most willing to answer questions. She seemed to know little about life outside of the [[Keeper's Temple]], not even knowing what parents were.<ref name="DYKWYCA" />

==Skills and abilities==
Through some unknown means Wind had complete mastery over her namesake element, creating both weak and strong gusts of wind at will. She had complete control over these gusts, and could use them to blow scattered debris, or even people.<ref name="DYKWYCA" /><ref name="COM" />
